text: I am surrounded by artifacts of learning, technology, and contemplation. The first image feels quiet—almost meditative with its minimalism and the suggestion of soft conversation or private thought among the beanbags. The second is bright, energetic, and somewhat more stimulating, with the pop of colors and the presence of research and development themes. Here, I feel suspended between focused solitude and creative possibility, inspired to ponder the connections between human intellect, evolving technologies, and the very spaces we choose to inhabit.
